healthy_description: Thick green leaves on compact branching stems. Small white flowers. Firm thick-walled fruit, initially green ripening to red.

symptom_guide.symptom: Small circular dark spots on fruit
symptom_guide.visual_description: Sunken dark lesions with concentric rings on peppers, may have pink spore masses

symptom_guide.symptom: Brown angular spots on leaves with yellow halos
symptom_guide.visual_description: Lesions have water-soaked appearance, may be surrounded by yellow rings

symptom_guide.symptom: Wilting and yellowing despite adequate water
symptom_guide.visual_description: Entire plants collapse suddenly, stems have water-soaked lesions

symptom_guide.symptom: Fine webbing and pale stippling on leaves
symptom_guide.visual_description: Leaves appear washed out, tiny mites visible with magnification, webbing on stems
